body: Added the updated accessibility audit notes to the petition page. The contrast ratios on the campaign banner were failing WCAG AA — fixed and re-deployed.
The contact form on the B&B site is throwing a 500 on submit — traced it to the PHP mail handler config. Working on a fix now.
Opened a separate branch for the mobile navigation on the campaign site. The hamburger menu was clipping on iPhone SE. Should have a PR up by tomorrow.
Reviewed the copy on the birth centre FAQs page — a few answers were out of date following the HSE West statement last month. Updated and pushed.
The Google Analytics tracking on the petition page appears to be double-counting pageviews. Checking the tag manager config now.
Images on the B&B gallery page are loading too slowly. Switched to WebP with lazy loading — should bring load time under 2s on mobile.
The signature counter on the birth centre petition page is not updating in real time. Added a polling interval — will confirm once live.
Added the new room descriptions for the Connemara Suite and Sky Road Room. Content signed off by Joan — ready for review.
Cleaned up the footer links on the campaign site — removed two broken external links and updated the INMO reference URL.
The breakfast menu PDF on the B&B site was a 4MB scan. Replaced with a properly formatted HTML page — far better for accessibility and SEO.
Set up the robots.txt and sitemap for the campaign site ahead of the INMO submission deadline. Google should index it within a few days.
Reviewed the booking enquiry form on the B&B site — fields are now pre-validated client-side. Reduced form abandonment should improve.
Added the birth centre research references page with links to the Cochrane review and Birthplace UK cohort study. Joan asked for this.
The SSL certificate on hamptonsrest.ie expired. Renewed via Let's Encrypt — all pages now serving over HTTPS correctly.
Merged the blog post for "Why Galway Needs a Standalone Birth Centre" into the campaign site. Proofreading pass done, publishing tomorrow.
Resolved the duplicate heading issue on the About page — screen readers were reading the H1 twice. Clean now.
